div.div:
one ping-pong channel
parse inframe & error signal
output at most 3 eth-packet meta and if there are more than 3 packet in one beat, output error signal.

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 168px; height: 1px; padding-top: 735px; margin-left: 201px;

div.div:
ping-pong 16 channel join
collect output from 16 ping-pong channel in strict order.
discard some output if there are error across multi ping-pong channel
dispatch then into 4 output channel handler

note:
only output error signal if the error will influence the naxt beat in other ping-pong channel.

div.div:
channel poller, each beat poll 1 of 16 channel and handle 3 input port.
if packet cnt overflow in single beat, then do not forward the meta until next sop.

switch.text: channel poller, each beat poll 1 of 16 channel and handle 3 input port....

div.div: four forward worker, only forward the meta when all of the metas for a packet is bufferedd in the queue and there is no error in all of them. If any of them has error, then discard the metas in the queue.
